free_text: Two different LiF targets were used.
- A thin layer of natLiF (92.5% 7Li and 7.5% 6Li)
evaporated on top of a thick natTa substrate.
- A thin 6LiF (5% 7Li and  95% 6Li) layer, which was
evaporated on top of a natC substrate, with an
ultra-thin top layer of Au for wear protection and
integration of each peak of interest.
Data received from E.Taimpiri for IBANDL.
